ORDER AND JUDGMENT: THE COURT HEREBY ORDERS AND ADJUDGES THAT THE INTERPLEADER FUNDS PRESENTLY HELD BY THE COURT WILL BE RETURNED TO W.R. JONES AND DARRELL AND SUSAN FRENCH. JONES WILL HOLD THE MONEY IN TRUST AND PAY THE INTERPLEADER COST TO MARCUS MERCHASIN. THE BALANCE OF THE FUNDS CAN THEN BE DISTRIBUTED ACCORDING TO ANY FEE AGREEMENT.
